rationale: Review 1 identifies a genuine generality gap across three declarations (mapsTo_fiber, mapsTo_fiber_symm, fiberHomeomorph) whose proofs use only map_proj and would work for any s : Set B rather than just singletons {b} — a directly on-rubric finding confirmed in the diff. Review 2 finds only that mapsTo_fiber_symm is derivable from mapsTo_fiber applied to φ⁻¹, which is a real but narrower redundancy fix that does not expand the API's generality.
